Trigger.Name: WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
WHEN-VALIDATE-ITEM
WHEN-VALIDATE-RECORD
PRE-INSERT

RecordGroup.Name: PLAN_RG
RecordGroup.RecordGroupQuery: SELECT PLAN_CODE, PLAN_NAME FROM STORAGE_PLANS ORDER BY MONTHLY_PRICE

ProgramUnit.Name: POST_QUERY_TOTALS
ProgramUnit.ProgramUnitText: PROCEDURE POST_QUERY_TOTALS IS BEGIN NULL; END;
